property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: SUCCESSFUL - Your opponent takes X damage. X = the number of Unstoppable attacks you have performed this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Remove from the game 3 cards in your opponent's discards to draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Remove from the game up to 3 cards from your opponent's discards to gain X stages. X = the number of different card types removed.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If your opponent has more cards removed from the game than you do, your next Black styled attack this turn gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's life deck. Choose a card type among the 2 discarded cards and remove from the game all cards of that type from your opponent's discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, your opponent can only Refocus with an attack that has the same base cost as the attack you are performing.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: For this turn, after one of your Blue styled physical attacks deals damage, you may put in play a Blue styled Support from your discards with a base cost of X. X = the base damage of that attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 5: SUCCESSFUL - Draw X cards. X = the number of other successful Blue styled physical attacks you performed this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.) 1: Draw X cards. X = the number of Blue styled Energy Combat cards in your discards, to a max of 5.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: You may discard a Blue styled Energy Combat card to put into your hand a Blue styled Physical Combat card from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When your Refocus with an attack that has a lower base cost than the base cost of your opponent's attack, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your have Jeice and Recoome, this attack does +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 0: Your next styled attack this turn costs -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: If you have Jeice, you may have him lose up to 5 stages. For each stage lost, this attack does +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 0: If your next attack this Combat is stopped, each of your Allies gains 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Place the top 4 styled discards at the bottom of your life deck. If your MP is a Namek, put the top 6 styled discards at the bottom of your deck instead.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If you have only Saiyans, your energy attacks and refocused energy attacks do +1 damage. If you have only Humans, your physical attacks and refocused physical attacks do +1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Once per turn after you have taken damage from an attack, you may put a Guldo Named card from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: For this turn, when your opponent performs an attack, you may pay X stages to stop that attack. X = the number of attacks your opponent has performed this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: The next energy attack your opponent performs this Combat costs +1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: You may discard a Burter Named card from your hand to have this attack do +6 damage. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: Your next Named attack this Combat gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you Refocus with an attack, it does +1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you Refocus with an energy attack, you may draw the bottom card of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - Your opponent must pass in his next Attack Phase this Combat. If you pass in your next Attack Phase this Combat, take 3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If you have taken at least 5 damage this Combat, you may put up to 5 styled cards from your discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If your MP is level 2 or higher, your opponent's Allies cannot gain stages except during Power Up.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: Lose X stages. You may put X cards at the bottom of your life deck, or have your opponent lose X stages, or discard the top X cards of your opponent's life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Look at the bottom 5 cards of your discards. Put one of those cards in your hand and put the rest back at the bottom in any order.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Prevent X damage from your opponent's next attack this Combat. X = the number of Nameks you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: If you discarded at least one card from your hand this Combat, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If you have only Nameks, this attack does +3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: If you have more Supports than your opponent, this attack does +X damage. X = your opponent's base PUR.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, you count as having a power rating of 1 for your card effects and for the AT.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: CONSTANT - Your opponent must pay 1 stage to stop an attack while your personality performing that attack has a power rating of 1,000 or less.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Put up to X Orange styled Supports from your discards at the bottom of your life deck. X = the number of Supports you have.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If your MP is a Namek, when your Refocus with this attack, its base damage is 5 instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 0: Choose one of your other Nameks. That Namek may lose up to 5 stages to have your Piccolo gain X stages. X = twice the amount lost.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: Take 3 damage to have your MP gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your opponent takes 3 damage after he stops a physical attack performed by this personality.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery:

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: For this turn, your opponent takes 2 damage when he Refocuses against your other Red styled attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: For this turn, when you Refocus with an attack, you may put into your hand a red styled card from your discards that has a base cost of 2 stages or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, when you Refocus with one of your Red styled attacks, you may put the bottom card of your discard pile at the bottom of your life deck to have that attack do +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.) 2: For this turn, your Saiyan styled attacks cost -X stages and do -X damage. X = the base cost of that attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: This attack does +1 damage for each other Saiyan styled attack you have performed this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: If your opponent has 10 or more cards removed from the game, this attack gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, Mastery: If your opponent has more cards removed from the game than you, search your life deck for a Black styled Support and put it in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: Your opponent discards a random card from his hand. If that card was an Energy or Physical Combat card, he may draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: For this turn, your opponent cannot Refocus against your styled attacks with the same card type as the attack. For this turn, your Black styled attacks gain "Unstoppable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - For this turn, when you Refocus with a Blue styled physical attack, you count as having performed +1 Blue styled physical attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 4, Mastery: If you Refocus with this card, put into your hand up to 2 Blue styled Physical Combat cards from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: You may remove from the game a Blue styled card from your discards to put a Blue styled Support with a base cost of X from your discards into your hand. X = the base damage of the removed card.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - You may only have Ginyu Force Members as Allies. You may have 2 additional Allies. Your PUR gains +1 for each of your Allies.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Once per turn when your opponent performs a styled attack that is Unstoppable, you may take 3 damage to stop that attack. (The attack still counts as Unstoppable.)

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Once per turn and after you discard to use your Mastery, you may take 4 damage. If you do, you may use your Mastery again this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Draw a card. If you have a Super Saiyan, draw 2 cards instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: This attack does +1 damage for each other Namek you have, and -1 damage for each Alien your opponent has.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If your MP is a Namek, Namekian styled attacks this personality performs cost -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: You may remove from the game a Namekian styled card from your discards to shuffle into your life deck X styled cards from your discards. X = the base cost of the removed card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: You may shuffle your hand into your life deck to draw the bottom 3 cards of your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: Lose X stages. Discard up to 2 of your opponent's Supports that each have a base cost of X or less.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: Gain 3 stages. You cannot attack for this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4, Namek: For this turn, Refocusing costs your opponent +1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: If the top card of your discards is Namekian styled, your opponent skips his next Attack Phase this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 4: Reveal the top X cards of your life deck. You may pay 1 stage to put one of those cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your life deck in any order. X = the number of Nameks you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If the top 5 cards of your discards are Namekian styled, your opponent loses 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - When you Refocus with a styled attack, that attack's damage gains +2 if defending against a Named attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, you may discard one of your Orange styled Supports in play to stop a physical or energy attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - If you have more Supports than your opponent, you may remove from the game a Support in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3, Mastery: You may discard one of your Supports in play to search your life deck for an Orange styled attack with X base cost or less. X = the number of Supports you have.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - If you have only Nameks, draw the top card of your discards and take X damage. X = the base cost of that card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: For this turn, your attacks performed by Recoome count as physical attacks for your card effects. Your next styled physical attack this turn does +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: CONSTANT - Once per turn when you Refocus with a Red styled attack, your next attack that turn does +X damage. X = the base cost of the attack you Refocused with.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Choose an Attack Type. For this turn, when you Refocus with an attack of that type, you may draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: If your opponent Refocused against your last attack this Combat, they cannot Refocus against this attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you have at least 6 Red styled cards in your discards and if you have Refocused at least twice this turn, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP is Level 2 or higher, this card costs -1 stage to Refocus.) 5, Mastery: If you Refocus with this attack, its damage gains +5

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Your next Saiyan styled energy attack this Combat gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: You may take 1 damage to put this card at the bottom of your life deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 4, Mastery: Draw a card for each Saiyan styled Support you have in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.) 1: If your next attack this Combat is a Saiyan styled attack, you may search your life deck for a copy of that card and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Search your life deck for 3 different Saiyan styled cards and reveal them to your opponent. He chooses one of them for you to put in your hand, and you remove the rest from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If your opponent has any Super Saiyans, attacks performed by this personality do +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: For this turn, if Vegeta is your MP then your attacks that have a base damage of 6 or more can only have their damage prevented by 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: SUCCESSFUL - Reveal the top card of your life deck. You may pay 1 stage to put that card into your hand. If you do, your opponent takes 3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage for each card removed from the game that your opponent has more than you, to a minimum of 1.) 6:

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5, Mastery: If your opponent has at least 10 cards removed from the game, draw 2 cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - You may return to its owner's hand a Blue styled Support you control to put in play a Blue styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: For this turn and the next, Blue styled Supports you play cost -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Put in play a Blue styled Support from your discards. Your next Blue styled attack this turn does +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 3: Search your life deck for a Blue styled Event and put it in your hand. Discard the top X cards of your life deck. X = the base cost of the Event.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: This attack does +1 damage for each of your Allies that performed an attack this Combat. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: You may put the top card of your discards at the bottom of your life deck, or you may search your life deck for a Dende Named card and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If your MP's power rating is higher than your opponent's MP's power rating, this attack gains "Unstoppable" and "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This attack costs -X stages. X = the level of the personality performing this attack.) (Unstoppable.) 9: If your oppponent has any Saiyans, draw a card. SUCCESFUL - Capture!

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If Gohan is your MP and you have at least one other Saiyan and/or Human, then for this Combat your opponent cannot put cards at the bottom of his life deck and cannot shuffle cards into his life deck.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: You may put in play a Saiyan styled Support from your hand to draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage for each Ally you have. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) (Unstoppable.) 10: If your opponent Refocuses against this attack, his MP's base PUR is 0 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have Guldo's Time Freeze in your discards, your next styled attack this turn gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: If you played Guldo's Time Freeze this turn, this attack gains "Unpreventable." and does +X damage. X = the number of attacks you stopped this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESFUL - You may discard 2 cards from your hand to have each of your other Allies gain 1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your styled attacks do +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - While you control at least 3 other Dragon Balls, attacks performed by your MP cost -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.) 3, Namek: Each of your personalities gains X stages. X = the number of Nameks you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 5, Namek: Shuffle X cards from your discards into your life deck and draw X cards. X = the number of Nameks you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3, Namek: If the top 7 cards of your discards are Namekian styled, you may shuffle any of them into your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: If your next Orange styled attack this Combat has a base damage of X or less, it gains "Unpreventable." X = the number of Orange styled Supports you have when you perform that attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 4, Mastery: CONSTANT - Your base AT is X. X = the number of Orange styled Supports you have, to a max of 5.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 4: If you have more Supports than your opponent, put up to 3 Orange styled cards from your discards at the top of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: CONSTANT - After one of your Orange styled Supports is discarded as damage, your next Orange styled attack this turn costs -X stages, to a minimum of 1. X = the base cost of the discarded Support.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If your opponent has played a Named card this Combat, search your discard pile for a Named card and put it in your hand. Discard a card at random from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 6: If your opponent has any Saiyans, this attack does -2 damage. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. The next card you Refocus with this turn costs -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: For this turn while you have at least 10 Red styled cards in your discard pile, your opponent must pay +1 stage to Refocus against your other Red styled attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: The next time you Refocus with a Red styled attack this turn, you may put in play a Support from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage for each other Saiyan styled attack you performed this Combat to a minimum of 1.) 5:

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: Discard a Saiyan styled Support from your hand to draw a card and search your life deck for a Saiyan styled Support and put it in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Search your life deck for a Saiyan styled Support and put it in your hand. You may take up to 5 damage to have your next Saiyan styled attack this Combat do +X damage. X = the amount of damage you took.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: Your next Saiyan styled physical attack this Combat gains, "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your opponent has any Aliens and/or Nameks, this attack gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, Freestyle cards you play cost -X stages, to a minimum of 1. X = the number of Dragon Balls you control when you play that card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Your next styled attack this Combat costs -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Choose one of your opponent's personalities in play. If that personality has a non-Constant power, it loses that power for this turn and this personality gains it for this turn.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: For this turn, your physical attacks gain "SUCCESSFUL - Your opponent's attacks do -1 damage this turn."

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you Refocus with this attack its damage is 2 instead) 0: For the rest of the turn when you Refocus against your opponent's energy attack, your opponent loses 1 stage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you take damage from an attack and you did not prevent any of that damage, your attacks do +1 damage this turn.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - While 2 or more of your Allies each have 5 stages, attacks performed by this personality do +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: SUCCESSFUL - Each of your Allies may lose 1 stage for this personality to gain X stages, X = 2 time the number of stages lost.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Alien; Android

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - While King Cold is your MP, your opponent's effects cannot make this personality lose stages.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Discard the top card of your life deck to draw X cards. X = the base cost of the discarded card.
